2605.10293.title: Robust Probabilistic Shielding for Safe Offline Reinforcement Learning
2605.10293.paper_summary: In offline reinforcement learning (RL), we learn policies from fixed datasets without environment interaction. The major challenges are to provide guarantees on the (1) performance and (2) safety of the resulting policy. A technique called safe policy improvement (SPI) provides a performance guarantee: with high probability, the new policy outperforms a given baseline policy, which is assumed to be safe. Orthogonally, in the context of safe RL, a shield provides a safety guarantee by restricting the action space to those actions that are provably safe with respect to a given safety-relevant model. We integrate these paradigms by extending shielding to offline RL, relying solely on the available dataset and knowledge of safe and unsafe states. Then, we shield the policy improvement steps, guaranteeing, with high probability, a safe policy. Experimental results demonstrate that shielded SPI outperforms its unshielded counterpart, improving both average and worst-case performance, particularly in low-data regimes.
2605.10293.paper_summary_zh: 在離線強化學習 (RL) 中，我們從固定的數據集學習策略，而不進行環境互動。主要挑戰是提供對於 (1) 性能和 (2) 安全性的保證。名為安全策略改進 (SPI) 的技術提供了性能保證：以高概率，新策略的表現超過給定的基準策略，而該基準策略被假定為安全的。另一方面，在安全 RL 的背景下，防護罩通過將動作空間限制為那些根據給定的安全相關模型被證明為安全的動作來提供安全保證。我們通過將防護罩擴展到離線 RL，整合這些範式，僅依賴可用的數據集和對安全及不安全狀態的知識。然後，我們對策略改進步驟進行防護，從而以高概率保證一個安全的策略。實驗結果表明，經過防護的 SPI 在性能上超過其未經防護的對應物，改善了平均性能和最壞情況性能，特別是在低數據情境中。
2605.10293.author: Maris F. L. Galesloot et.al.
2605.10293.authors: Maris F. L. Galesloot, Thomas Rhemrev, Nils Jansen
